sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, '10'), (2, 'not_a_number'), (3, NULL);
SELECT id, value, isinteger(CAST(value AS INTEGER)) AS is_num FROM test_table WHERE isinteger(CAST(value AS INTEGER)) = 1;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE isinteger(CAST(value AS INTEGER)) BETWEEN 1 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY isinteger(CAST(value AS INTEGER))) AS num_count FROM test_table GROUP BY id, isinteger(CAST(value AS INTEGER)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND isinteger(CAST(value AS INTEGER)) = 0 AND id BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, score FLOAT);
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, score) VALUES (1, 89.5), (2, NULL), (3, 10.1);
SELECT t1.id, t2.score FROM test_table t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE isinteger(t1.id) = 1 AND t2.score BETWEEN 10 AND 90;
UPDATE test_table SET value = '0' WHERE isinteger(CAST(value AS INTEGER)) = 0;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR isinteger(value) = 0 AND NOT (id BETWEEN 1 AND 2);
